data.title: Valiant Solutions acquires Abile Group to enhance cybersecurity services for U.S. Federal agencies and National Security missions.
data.description: Valiant Solutions, a cybersecurity technology and services provider for U.S. Federal agencies, revealed on February 17, 2026, that they have acquired Abile Group. Abile Group specializes in offering secure network and cyber engineering services and technology to National Security. This acquisition highlights Valiant Solutions' commitment to strengthening its position in the market and expanding its offerings. The specific financial details of the acquisition were not disclosed in the announcement.

data.title: Gilat gets $9M order from Israel’s Ministry of Defense for advanced modems to enhance satellite communications.
data.description: Gilat Defense announced that it will be providing cutting-edge modems to enhance and expand secure, vital satellite communications for defense operations. The advanced modems will play a crucial role in supporting and amplifying the communication network, ensuring seamless connectivity in critical situations. This development marks a significant milestone in bolstering defense capabilities, with the company expected to deliver a notable number of modems to meet the growing demands of defense operations. The focus on enhancing communication systems highlights the importance of reliable connectivity in military settings, with Gilat Defense at the forefront of providing innovative solutions for mission-critical requirements.

data.title: Thesis Gold Inc. rebrands to Thesis Gold & Silver Inc. effective Feb 20, 2026. Stock symbols include TSXV: TAU, OTCQX: THSGF, WKN: A3EP87.
data.description: Based in Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 17, 2026, Thesis Gold Inc. declared its upcoming name change to "Thesis Gold & Silver Inc." effective from February 20, 2026. The company, listed on TSXV as TAU, OTCQX as THSGF, and WKN as A3EP87, shared this update with the public.

data.title: Pasithea Therapeutics (Nasdaq: KTTA) will present at Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on Feb 25, 2026, at 4:00 PM ET.
data.description: Pasithea Therapeutics, a company listed on Nasdaq as KTTA, is scheduled to participate in the Oppenheimer 36th Annual Healthcare Life Sciences Conference on Thursday, February 25, 2026, at 4:00 PM Eastern Time.

data.title: Portal Diabetes receives FDA Breakthrough for insulin pump; advancing toward functional T1D cure.
data.description: A significant advancement has been made in the path towards finding a functional cure for Type 1 Diabetes (T1D) in Westfield, Indiana. On February 17, 2026, Portal Diabetes, Inc. disclosed acquiring the Breakthrough Device Designation from the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for their newly developed implantable insulin pump system. This designation highlights the innovative approach of the system in revolutionizing diabetes management. This approval paves the way for further development and testing of the technology that could potentially benefit the estimated 1.6 million Americans currently living with T1D.

data.title: Compugen (NASDAQ: CGEN) to release Q4 and full year 2025 results on March 2, 2026. Headquarters: Holon, Israel.
data.description: In Holon, Israel, on February 17, 2026, Compugen Ltd. revealed it will be presenting its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. As a leading cancer immunotherapy company utilizing AI/ML for drug target discovery, Compugen Ltd. operates under the tickers NASDAQ: CGEN and TASE: CGEN.

data.title: Costa Rica to host MedTech forum with over 100 global leaders, known for exporting $10 billion in medical devices in 2025.
data.description: CINDE is hosting a forum in Costa Rica that will bring together leaders in the MedTech and healthcare sectors on a global scale. Known as a prominent MedTech hub, Costa Rica reached a milestone by exporting more than US$10 billion worth of medical devices in 2025. The country is home to over 100 multinational life sciences companies, among which are 14 of the world's top 30 MedTech firms. The forum aims to showcase the thriving industry in Costa Rica and foster collaboration among industry players.

data.title: Vulcan materials' 2025 earnings show 29% growth in operating cash flow to $1.8 billion. Expecting further growth in 2026.
data.description: Vulcan Materials Company reported a significant increase in operating cash flow, which rose by 29% to reach $1.8 billion. The company also experienced growth in full-year earnings and saw an expansion in margins. With an anticipated growth in aggregates demand and a favorable pricing environment, Vulcan Materials Company expects to continue its earnings growth into 2026. The company is based in Birmingham, Alabama, and released this information on February 17, 2026.

data.title: Luca reports intersection of 136m containing 1.6 g/t Gold, 77 g/t Silver, 0.9% Copper, and 1.6% Zinc at Largo Norte Zone, Campo Morado Mine.
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia on February 17, 2026, Luca Mining Corp. revealed underground drill findings from the Campo Morado polymetallic VMS mine in Guerrero State, Mexico. Luca, listed on TSX-V as LUCA, OTCQX as LUCMF, and Frankfurt as Z68, shared promising results from the exploration program.

data.title: Fluor Corp reports 2025 financial results and projects significant EPC awards in 2026 & 2027; CEO mentions NuScale investment monetization progress.
data.description: Fluor Corporation revealed its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2025. CEO Jim Breuer expressed optimism about securing substantial EPC awards in 2026 and 2027 due to favorable capital spending conditions and rising client commitments. The company is making progress in monetizing its NuScale investment, indicating a promising future. Fluor's stock is listed on the NYSE under the symbol FLR.

data.title: Labcorp's 2025 Q4 revenue $3.52B, EPS $1.98 vs $1.70. Full year revenue $13.95B, EPS $10.46 vs $8.84.
data.description: The company recently unveiled its financial guidance for 2026, showcasing a notable improvement in its operations compared to 2024. In terms of revenue, the fourth quarter of 2026 saw a rise to $3.52 billion from $3.33 billion in the same period in 2024. Similarly, the full-year revenue for 2026 climbed to $13.95 billion from $13.01 billion in 2024. Looking at the diluted earnings per share (EPS), there was a significant increase as well. In the fourth quarter of 2026, the EPS stood at $1.98, up from $1.70 in 2024. The full-year diluted EPS for 2026 reached $10.46, a substantial growth from $8.84 in 2024. Moreover, the adjusted EPS also displayed a positive trend in 2026. In Q4, the adjusted EPS was $4.07, compared to $3.45 in 2024. The full-year adjusted EPS for 2026 was...

UK Maritime Trade Operations reported an incident 70 nautical miles southwest of Yemen’s Aden port, where a vessel was approached and hailed by a white skiff carrying five people, followed by an exchange of small-arms fire.

STEALTH JETS SURGE TOWARD THE MIDDLE EAST The US Air Force is rapidly redeploying F-22 stealth fighters and F-16 squadrons toward the region — supported by KC-135 tankers transiting bases in the UK, Germany, and Greece.

IRGC: WE CAN RESTRICT HORMUZ TRAFFIC IRGC Navy Commander Brig. Gen. Alireza Tangsiri says Iran has full surveillance over the Strait of Hormuz — and the ability to restrict traffic if needed. The chokepoint carries 21% of global petroleum liquids.

data.title: Fluor (NYSE: FLR) Q4 earnings disappoint with EPS of $0.33, missing estimates by -2.94%. Revenue down $85M from last year.
data.description: Fluor (FLR) released its Q4 earnings on Tuesday, February 17, 2026 at 05:50 AM. The earnings report showed that Fluor fell short of estimated earnings by -2.94%, with an EPS of $0.33 compared to the expected $0.34. Revenue decreased by $85.00 million from the previous year. In the prior earnings period, the company exceeded expectations on EPS by $0.23. Further details can be found on Benzinga.com.
Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi and visiting French President Emmanuel Macron participate in an exchange of agreements and deliver joint remarks during a news conference in Mumbai.

data.title: Global seafood market to grow from US$409.1 billion in 2026 to US$611.1 billion by 2033, at a 5.9% CAGR.
data.description: In London on February 17, 2026, it was reported that the worldwide seafood market is anticipated to reach a value of US$ 409.1 billion in 2026 and is forecasted to increase to US$ 611.1 billion by 2033. The market is expected to grow at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 5.9% during the period from 2026 to 2033. This growth is attributed to the increasing preference for healthy dietary choices and a swift surge in demand for seafood products globally.

data.title: Genuine Parts Company reports Q4 2025 results, declares dividend increase for 70th year, plans to separate businesses.
data.description: Genuine Parts Company (NYSE: GPC) has announced their dividend increase for the 70th consecutive year. They have also revealed their 2026 outlook. In addition, the company has disclosed their plan to separate their automotive and industrial businesses into two distinct public companies, both aiming to lead in their industries. This development marks a significant move for the company and reflects their commitment to growth and specialization in each sector.
